{{Quote|Please, no blasters in my bar … here, hit him with this chair.|Gularg|<ref name="RP" />}}
'''Gularg the Hutt''' was the owner and [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] of [[Gularg's Libation Emporium]] on [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]]. Gularg was approximately 600 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

{{Char-stub}}
